style_name: Sunlit Kinetic Block Type Photo Poster
style_summary: A high-energy editorial sports and lifestyle poster style built from full-bleed sunlit photography, oversized cream condensed block typography, diagonal subject crops, compact microcopy clusters, and vivid blue-sky color fields.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main subject
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: observable style traits that must remain visible
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: literal source content that generated samples must not recreate

style_fidelity_anchors: Full-bleed bright outdoor photographic base with clear blue sky or blue-toned open space occupying a major part of the frame.
Immense cream or warm-white condensed block sans typography, cropped by the canvas and partially hidden behind the subject.
A single oversized action subject crosses the poster diagonally and breaks through the type layer.
Low or close camera angle gives the body, object, or prop exaggerated scale and forward momentum.
Bottom and side edges carry secondary text blocks, large numerals, or stacked words in the same cream-white palette.
Compact white microcopy appears in short editorial paragraphs or bilingual-style clusters, aligned to strong grid positions.
Vivid accent color is concentrated on the prop, footwear, clothing, or object while the environment stays sky-blue and neutral.
Hard midday sunlight, crisp shadows, glossy skin or material highlights, and high contrast edges.
Layered poster hierarchy alternates between flat graphic type and realistic photography without illustration effects.
Minimal graphic ornament: small script-like mark, tiny symbol, short rules, or separators, never decorative clutter.
Dense but controlled layout: very little empty border, large foreground scale, and text locked to corners or bands.
Commercial event-poster energy with editorial sports-magazine confidence and motion-first composition.
source_content_to_avoid: Do not recreate a sprint runner in a starting crouch or the exact bent-over launch silhouette from the source.
Do not show the same running shoes, shoe color placement, race track angle, or foot-level shoe hero composition.
Do not use the words RUN, Right Now, any copied date range, or the original Chinese slogan.
Do not include Nike, swoosh marks, real sportswear logos, signature marks, watermarks, creator IDs, or brand names.
Do not duplicate the source story premise of a running mileage check-in gift campaign.
Do not reuse the same sky-road-athlete arrangement with the torso and arm matching the source crop.
Do not reproduce the exact large background letter shapes from the source as a recognizable copy.
Do not include identifiable faces, copyrighted athlete likenesses, or real event identities from the source.

visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: The poster uses a layered collision: giant type sits as an architectural background, the photographic subject cuts diagonally across it, and smaller text locks to corners and lower bands.
visual_deconstruction.subject_placement: The subject is oversized, close to the camera, cropped at edges, and placed so limbs, prop, or clothing overlap both sky and typography.
visual_deconstruction.camera_perspective: Low, close, wide-angle outdoor photo perspective with a horizon low in the frame and the subject moving through the viewer's space.
visual_deconstruction.typography_system: Ultra-bold condensed block sans display type for the main word, stacked chunky secondary words, compact microcopy in tight white paragraphs, and occasional handwritten-script accents.
visual_deconstruction.color_behavior: Dominant saturated cyan-blue sky, warm cream typography, neutral ground, dark subject shadows, and one intense accent color on the hero object or wardrobe.
visual_deconstruction.texture_and_lighting: Crisp sunlight, hard shadows, realistic photographic grain, slight motion tension, and clean poster-print contrast.

composition.canvas: Use the requested {ASPECT_RATIO} frame as a full-bleed editorial poster, with no outer border or card.
composition.type_layer: Place massive cropped cream block letters behind the subject, filling more than half the canvas and touching or exceeding the edges.
composition.photo_layer: Use one realistic action photograph that overlaps the type and foreground, with the body or object forming a strong diagonal.
composition.text_zones: Reserve small grid-locked areas for microcopy at the top or mid-left, a stacked bottom-left wordmark area, a bottom-center short line, and a bottom-right numeral or label cluster.
composition.balance: Keep the layout dense and kinetic while preserving a clear hierarchy: main action first, giant type second, microcopy third.

typography.display: Extra-condensed, extra-heavy block sans, warm cream, extremely large, cropped by frame edges, with tight spacing and poster-scale weight.
typography.secondary: Chunky stacked cream words or numerals placed at the lower edge, sometimes partially cropped.
typography.microcopy: Small white compact sans-serif paragraphs, event-note style, aligned in tight left or right blocks.
typography.accent: A small script-like mark or simple symbol can sit near the top, but it must be generic and non-branded.
typography.text_behavior: Text functions as graphic mass; legibility is important for the main word, while microcopy may read as compact editorial texture.

color_palette.palette_rule: Keep blue and cream as the poster's main read, then concentrate saturated accents on the hero prop or wardrobe rather than scattering color everywhere.

photographic_direction.rendering_mode: Realistic commercial action photography combined with flat graphic poster typography.
photographic_direction.lighting: Bright direct sun, crisp highlights, hard cast shadows, clean summer atmosphere, and visible material shine.
photographic_direction.lens: Low-angle wide or close perspective that exaggerates the foreground object and makes the subject feel physically close.
photographic_direction.motion: Freeze the decisive action moment, with tension in limbs, fabric, object angle, or splash lines rather than blur-heavy effects.
photographic_direction.finish: Editorial print poster finish with clean contrast, slight realistic grain, and no painterly, cartoon, or 3D rendering.

design_rules: Use one dominant subject and one dominant action; do not split attention across many people or products.
Make the display type larger than the subject in area, but let the subject physically interrupt and obscure the letters.
Keep the typography cream or warm white against a blue-dominant outdoor photographic field.
Place compact microcopy in small rectangular blocks that feel like event terms, stats, or editorial notes.
Use a vivid accent only where it improves motion focus, such as on a bike frame, crate label, jacket, board, or paddle.
Crop at least one major element at the edge so the poster feels immediate and oversized.
Maintain a commercial poster hierarchy with bold bottom information bands or number clusters.
Avoid decorative overlays that are not present in the style, such as stickers, grunge rips, halftone clouds, or UI chrome.
do: Use bright sunlit outdoor photography with strong blue fields.
Use giant cropped cream condensed typography as a structural background.
Let the subject overlap the type and break the flat graphic plane.
Use low-angle perspective and diagonal action to create speed.
Keep small editorial text blocks tight, white, and grid-aligned.
Use one concentrated neon or warm accent on the hero object or outfit.
avoid: No real brand logos, swooshes, watermarks, signatures, usernames, QR codes, or creator marks.
No recreated runner-start scene, running shoe hero ad, or copied campaign text from the source.
No dense collage clutter, sticker packs, comic effects, 3D renders, vector-only graphics, or painterly illustration.
No soft beige lifestyle palette, dark studio lighting, muted editorial minimalism, or monochrome poster treatment.
No tiny subject floating in empty space; the action must be oversized and physically close.
No exact source layout duplication where the same word size, body angle, and bottom text arrangement become recognizable.
prompt_template: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} full-bleed editorial action poster in the Sunlit Kinetic Block Type Photo Poster style. Style fidelity anchors that must remain visible: {STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS}. Source content to avoid: {SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID}. Use a realistic bright outdoor photograph as the base: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION} with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP} in {LOCATION}, with {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Camera and composition: low or close wide-angle perspective, oversized foreground scale, decisive frozen motion, one strong diagonal crossing the frame, the subject cropped by at least one edge. Typography: place immense warm-cream extra-condensed block sans display lettering reading {MAIN_TEXT} behind the subject, filling over half the canvas, cropped by the frame and partially obscured by the action. Add compact white microcopy reading {SECONDARY_TEXT} in tight editorial blocks, plus a small generic {ACCENT_SYMBOL} mark and bottom information clusters in cream. Wardrobe and styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Color system: saturated sky-blue or cyan dominant field, warm cream typography, crisp white microcopy, deep shadows, and one vivid accent color concentrated on the hero prop or wardrobe. Lighting and finish: hard midday sunlight, crisp shadows, high contrast commercial photo realism, slight print-poster grain, no illustration or 3D rendering, no real logos or watermarks. Generate as a 4K ultra-high-resolution raster image.
negative_prompt: real brand logos, Nike, swoosh, signature watermark, creator ID, QR code, copied RUN text, copied Right Now text, copied date range, copied Chinese slogan, runner starting crouch, running shoe hero ad, exact source pose, exact source road and sky arrangement, identifiable athlete likeness, cluttered collage, sticker pack, comic halftone, 3D render, vector-only poster, painterly illustration, low-resolution text, dark studio scene, muted beige palette, tiny distant subject

values.SUBJECT: a road cyclist
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: leaning hard into a coastal turn
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a matte silver racing bicycle with neon lime handlebar tape
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: low horizon, blue sky, pale sea line, sharp asphalt shadows
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: speed log / coastal interval / keep moving
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: clean black cycling kit with a small coral sleeve accent
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: blue full-bleed sunlit photo, giant cropped cream condensed type, diagonal oversized action subject, low camera angle, tight white microcopy blocks, bottom cream information clusters, one neon accent, crisp midday contrast
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no runner, no starting crouch, no running shoes as hero product, no Nike or swoosh, no RUN or Right Now wording, no copied date range

values.SUBJECT: a grocer in motion
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: lifting a crate of citrus from a delivery cart
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a bright orange produce crate with simple blank labels
values.LOCATION: an open-air morning market under a blue awning
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: sunlit pavement, blurred fruit stalls, hard shadows, patches of open sky
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: morning drop / market count / open early
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: navy work apron, white tee, and a hot coral cap
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: blue-dominant full-bleed photo, giant cream block typography behind the action, close cropped diagonal subject, compact white event microcopy, cream bottom labels, bright prop accent, hard sunlight, editorial poster density
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no runner, no athletic shoe close-up, no race track, no Nike or sportswear marks, no RUN or Right Now wording, no copied source campaign premise

values.SUBJECT: a street dancer
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: spinning through a high kick on a rooftop court
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a translucent blue training bag sliding near the foreground
values.LOCATION: a rooftop practice court at noon
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: open blue sky, low city rail, sunlit concrete, long crisp shadows
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: practice hour / motion record / repeat the beat
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: charcoal cropped jacket, cream shorts, and magenta socks
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: sunlit cyan photo field, enormous cropped cream condensed lettering, oversized diagonal body crossing type, low close camera, tight microcopy, bottom cream word clusters, vivid wardrobe accent, realistic hard-light finish
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no sprint runner pose, no running event, no shoe advertisement, no Nike or swoosh, no RUN text, no copied bottom date layout

values.SUBJECT: a kayaker
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: cutting across a splashy blue channel

values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: blue water reflections, low shoreline, open sky, spray frozen in sunlight
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: water line / turn marker / hold the edge

values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: full-bleed blue outdoor photo, huge warm-cream block sans headline, close action subject crossing diagonally, low waterline camera, compact white microcopy, cream lower information blocks, saturated prop accents, crisp sunlit realism
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no runner, no running shoes, no road start pose, no Nike mark, no RUN or Right Now text, no exact source athlete silhouette
